# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AirAbsorptionCutoffFreqMax property

Lowpass cutoff frequency at the maximum distance (furthest from the source). Lower values produce heavier muffling at long range.

```csharp
public int AirAbsorptionCutoffFreqMax { get; set; }
```
